summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel and Enhanced Lesson Page features. 18 backend API tests passed (100%), 53 frontend E2E tests passed (100%, 1 skipped). Found 1 SECURITY BUG: password_hash exposed in /api/admin/users response. CDN issue: static audio files return HTML instead of audio content through CDN (works locally).

issues.description: SECURITY: Admin users endpoint /api/admin/users exposes password_hash field in response. This is a security vulnerability - hashed passwords should never be exposed in API responses.
issues.reproduction:
1. Login as admin (admin@thecryptocoach.io)
2. Call GET /api/admin/users
3. Observe password_hash field in user objects
issues.fix_suggestion: Add password_hash to projection exclusion: await db.users.find(query, {'_id': 0, 'hashed_password': 0, 'password_hash': 0})

issues.description: CDN routing issue: Static audio files served at /static/audio/*.mp3 return HTML content-type through CDN instead of audio/mpeg. Files work correctly via direct backend access (localhost:8001). This may affect audio playback in production.
AdminPage.jsx and LessonPage.jsx have no data-testid attributes. Adding data-testids would make tests more robust and maintainable.

action_items: FIX: SECURITY - Exclude password_hash from /api/admin/users response (HIGH priority)
INVESTIGATE: CDN configuration for static file MIME types
IMPROVE: Add data-testid attributes to AdminPage.jsx and LessonPage.jsx

features_tested.admin_dashboard_stats: PASS - Shows users, courses, lessons, subscription breakdown
features_tested.admin_courses_tab: PASS - Lists courses, shows lessons with audio status
features_tested.admin_users_tab: PASS - Lists users, search functionality works
features_tested.lesson_page_audio_mode: PASS - Mode Audio toggle shows audio player
features_tested.lesson_page_audio_controls: PASS - Intro/Complet/Résumé buttons, play/pause, speed selector
features_tested.lesson_page_content_sections: PASS - Objectives, content, examples, summary all displayed
features_tested.lesson_page_navigation: PASS - Progress sidebar, next/prev buttons, back to course link
features_tested.lesson_page_reading_progress: PASS - Progress bar visible at top
features_tested.static_audio_files_local: PASS - Audio files accessible via localhost:8001

seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user: admin@thecryptocoach.io / Admin123! and test user: test_subscription@example.com / Test123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel and lesson page audio features are fully functional. Security bug needs fixing (password_hash exposure). CDN static file issue may need infrastructure investigation. 4 lessons have audio generated (course-foundations-lesson-1 to 4). All other features work correctly.
rca_of_issue: BUG-001: The get_admin_users function excludes 'hashed_password' but not 'password_hash' - the actual field name used in user documents. Fix: Change line 3432 to exclude both field names.
